name: utils
description: Utility functions for class name merging.

name: accordion
description: Collapse and expand sections to show or hide content.

name: alert
description: Communicate important information or status to users.

name: avatar
description: Display user profile images with automatic fallback text.

name: badge
description: Label items with status or category tags.

name: button
description: Trigger actions or navigate when clicked.

name: card
description: Group and organize related content into a contained unit.

name: checkbox
description: Let users select or deselect individual options.

name: dialog
description: Display focused content in a modal overlay.

name: input
description: Collect single-line text input from users.

name: label
description: Associate descriptive text with form controls.

name: pagination
description: Navigate through paginated content with page indicators.

name: popover
description: Show contextual content anchored to a trigger element.

name: progress
description: Visualize task completion progress with a percentage indicator.

name: radio-group
description: Let users select exactly one option from a group.

name: select
description: Choose a single option from a collapsible list.

name: slider
description: Select a numeric value within a range using a slider.

name: toast
description: Show temporary notifications with automatic dismissal and optional actions.

name: switch
description: Toggle a boolean setting on or off.

name: tabs
description: Switch between multiple content sections with tab controls.

name: textarea
description: Collect multi-line text input from users.

name: tooltip
description: Display contextual information on hover or focus.
